---
name: bdd-test
---

# Universal BDD Test Instructions

1. Write feature files using Gherkin syntax for any domain.
2. Use tags to organize scenarios (e.g., @Batch, @Performance, @Regression, @Smoke, @UI).
3. Implement step definitions in your preferred language (e.g., JavaScript, TypeScript, Python).
4. Use hooks for setup and teardown logic.
5. Integrate reporting tools (e.g., Allure) for test results.
